zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Stourton於大約1251年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，他的父親Eudes de Stourton33歲，母親Grace Hungerford27歲。他於1290年與Lawrencia de Stourton在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1303年在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Stourton于大约1251年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾时，他的父亲Eudes de Stourton33岁，母亲Grace Hungerford27岁。他于1290年与Lawrencia de Stourton在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1303年在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Stourton was born about 1251, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Eudes de Stourton, was 33 and his mother, Grace Hungerford, was 27. He married Lawrencia de Stourton in 1290, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1303, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Stourton est né environ 1251, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Eudes de Stourton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Grace Hungerford, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lawrencia de Stourton en 1290, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1303, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Stourton um 1251 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes de Stourton 33 und seine Mutter Grace Hungerford 27. Er hat 1290 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Lawrencia de Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1303 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Stourton è nato il circa 1251 nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Eudes de Stourton, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Grace Hungerford, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lawrencia de Stourton nel 1290, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1303, nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Stourtonが約1251年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Eudes de Stourtonは33歳，母Grace Hungerfordは27歳であった。1290年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでLawrencia de Stourtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1303年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Stourton(이)가 대략 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes de Stourton(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Hungerford(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Lawrencia de Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1303년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Stourton nasceu aproximadamente 1251, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Eudes de Stourton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Grace Hungerford, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lawrencia de Stourton em 1290, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1303, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Stourton родился около 1251 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Eudes de Stourton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Grace Hungerford, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lawrencia de Stourton в 1290 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1303 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Stourton nació aproximadamente 1251, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Eudes de Stourton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Grace Hungerford, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lawrencia de Stourton en 1290, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1303, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
